items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario behavior regarding graceful degradation when the agent is confused. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific outcomes or traces that confirm this behavior. The linked use cases and prior steps do not provide concrete evidence to support the expected result of the scenario, leading to an inconclusive status.
